abilities.name: intimidate
abilities.description: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

effectChanges.description: Does not take effect if acquired after entering battle.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.description: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

effectChanges.description: struggle is unaffected. helping hand and defense curl are not taken into account.

abilities.name: steadfast
abilities.description: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
